title: Skillet Shrimp with Argentinian Flair
description: Succulent shrimp cooked in a skillet with the flavors of Argentina, featuring charred vegetables and silky textures.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced charred bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Reduce heat to medium and sprinkle the crumbled feta cheese over the shrimp.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
